title: Task-4 Create a Master Template and List All Tasks

content.problemStatement:
Our application can handle users, but it doesn't have a main page for our tasks yet. Your goal in this step is to build the core of the app: the task list page. 
### Tasks
1. Create a `base.html` master template that all other pages will inherit from. This will contain our site's navigation. (this step has been completed for you)
2. Create a new view called `task_list` that fetches all tasks from the database.
3. Complete the code for a new template, `task_list.html`, to display the tasks.
4. Wire up all the necessary URLs in `tasks/urls.py` and the main `taskmaster/urls.py`.
5. Refactoring: Now that the real /tasks/ page will exist, we will remove the temporary login_redirect_view workaround from Task 3.

**Files to Modify:**
- `taskmaster/settings.py` (To update the login redirect) - This has been done for you.
- `taskmaster/urls.py` (To remove the old redirect and include the new app URLs)
- `tasks/views.py` (To add the task_list view and remove the old redirect view)
- `tasks/urls.py` (New file for the tasks app)
- `tasks/templates/base.html` (New file for the master template)- This has been done for you.
- `tasks/templates/tasks/task_list.html` (New file to display tasks)
- `tasks/templates/registration/login.html` (To use the master template)
- `tasks/templates/registration/register.html` (To use the master template)
- `tasks/templates/homepage.html` (To use the master template)

**After completing the above:**
- Click on **RUN** to start the server. Open the browser on a new tab.
- Log in with a user. (`chef` `chefpass@123`). You should now be redirected to `.../tasks/` and see the "All Tasks" heading without a 404 error.
- Go to the admin panel (/admin/) and create one or two Task objects. Make sure to assign them to a user.
- Go back to the `/tasks/` page. You should now see the titles and details of the tasks you created.
- Navigate between the homepage, task list, and login/logout pages. You should see the same navigation bar on every page.
